package MyGame.GameObject.Weapon.Cores

  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    BiocatalystCore
    A core upgrade that uses biological effects to poison or weaken enemies.
    ChaosCore
    A core upgrade that introduces chaotic and unpredictable effects.
    CryptoCore
    A core upgrade that provides defensive or evasive enhancements.
    DataCore
    A core upgrade that enhances data processing or tech-based abilities.
    DynamoCore
    A core upgrade that focuses on energy generation and electrical attacks.
    EntropyCore
    A core upgrade that causes lingering deterioration on enemies.
    FractalCore
    A core upgrade that multiplies or splits projectiles and effects.
    KineticCore
    A core upgrade that increases the physical force and knockback of attacks.
    MatrixCore
    A core upgrade that manipulates space or enemy positioning.
    OverClockCore
    A core upgrade that increases attack speed and reduces cooldowns.
    OverHeatCore
    A core upgrade that sacrifices defense or health for extreme damage output.
    PlasmaCore
    A core upgrade that melts enemies with high-temperature energy.
    ResonanceCore
    A core upgrade that amplifies damage based on consecutive hits.
    SiphonCore
    A core upgrade that heals the player based on damage dealt.
    SomaticCore
    A core upgrade that enhances physical attributes and recovery.
    SurgeCore
    A core upgrade that provides bursts of power and damage.
    VectorCore
    A core upgrade that enhances projectile speed and direction.
